name: unique-cli
description: The Unique SDK CLI for Claude Cowork.

UNIQUE_API_KEY.title: Unique API key
UNIQUE_API_KEY.description: API key used to authenticate with the Unique API.

UNIQUE_APP_ID.title: Unique app ID
UNIQUE_APP_ID.description: Application ID used by the Unique SDK CLI.

UNIQUE_USER_ID.title: Unique user ID
UNIQUE_USER_ID.description: User ID used for Unique knowledge-base operations.

UNIQUE_COMPANY_ID.title: Unique company ID
UNIQUE_COMPANY_ID.description: Company ID used for Unique knowledge-base operations.

UNIQUE_API_BASE.title: Unique API base URL
UNIQUE_API_BASE.description: Unique API base URL used by the CLI.
